description: Implement switch identity reconciliation per DEC-0003 / FGAP-003: switchToExisting and switchAndCreate register config.substrate_id -> active dir via registerSubstrate when the id is absent from the project-root registry; a present-but-different-dir entry continues to raise substrate_id_registry_mismatch. Tests: switch to an unregistered-but-present-config substrate -> registered + context-validate clean; mismatch case preserved. Full completion sequence (build/check/test/runtime-demo/adversarial/skills). Via coding subagent; orchestrator runs all npm + is sole git writer; per-step commit.
notes: Implemented at 17d9a3b. reconcileActiveSubstrateRegistration wired into all three switch engine functions (switchToExisting, switchAndCreate, switchToPrevious). Build/check/test green; cli runtime demo across all three paths (register-if-absent, mismatch-preserved, switch- heals pruned-previous); a fresh adversarial re-audit (after the probe found switchToPrevious unwired) confirmed all three paths consistent + no-previous error path intact + no new defect. One of the two items in the 0.29.0 cut.
